notableEvents.label: Jesus Rodriguez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jesus Rodriguez grounds into a double play, second baseman Jake Cronenworth to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Bryce Eldridge out at 2nd. Jesus Rodriguez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
